00038 package java.lang;
00039 
00099 public class Throwable
00100 {
00104     private final String detailMessage;
00105 
00111     public Throwable()
00112     {
00113         this((String) null);
00114     }
00115 
00123     public Throwable(String message)
00124     {
00125         detailMessage = message;
00126     }
00127 
00133     public String getMessage()
00134     {
00135         return detailMessage;
00136     }
00137 
00146     public String toString()
00147     {
00148         String msg = getMessage();
00149         return getClass().getName() + (msg == null ? "" : ": " + msg);
00150     }
00151 
00237     public native void printStackTrace();
00238 }
